scenarios.name: no_noise_strong
scenarios.label: No noise, strong higher moments
scenarios.note: No residual noise; shocks have strong skewness or kurtosis.

scenarios.name: moderate_gaussian_noise
scenarios.label: Moderate Gaussian residual noise near rescaling exception
scenarios.note: Diagonal Gaussian residual noise in u-coordinates; for this B0 it is close to a structural-coordinate rescaling case.

scenarios.name: anisotropic_gaussian_noise
scenarios.label: Anisotropic Gaussian residual noise
scenarios.note: Diagonal Gaussian residual noise in u-coordinates with stronger structural-coordinate off-diagonal deformation.

scenarios.name: weak_higher_moments_with_noise
scenarios.label: Weak higher moments with Gaussian noise
scenarios.note: Same residual noise, but structural shocks are mostly Gaussian mixtures, weakening the higher-cumulant signal.
